hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '\.rs$' && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs rustfmt --edition 2021 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(Cargo\.lock|\.env|settings\.json)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files, secrets, or settings directly' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
